productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Lochraven Silver Black Shoe
description: Wring it to dry it! A next generation soccer cleat, the Lochraven III from reebok is a take off from the previous version, offering absolutely dry comfort even when playing in wet conditions. Absolutely flexible, it offers a barefoot feel, enhancing performance. Team this with performance clothing when gearing up to make those winning goals, or simply pair it with shorts and Sports tees for that casual look.Upper Synthetic fabric upper for dry Fit comfort Synthetic leather warp around overlay with perforations for shoe structure and maximum breathability Extra overlay over forefoot for durability and better ball feel Large diameter pull loop with toggle strap for a snug, customised fit Midsole TPU midsole for lightweight comfort Mildly padded footbed stitched to the midsole for all-day comfort and durability' Outsole Durable non-marking rubber outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard Circular suction lugs in medial forefoot and lateral back heel for cushioned comfort, absolute grip on wet terrain and for better protection while playing Slanting lugs and flex grooves along the rest of the outsole with branding on the heel for absolute flexibility and comfort Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
